verdict.answer_first: A; sentence 1 answers directly: "HTML React rendered on the server didn't match what it rendered on the client" while staying tighter than B's longer setup.
verdict.decisiveness: A; it narrows fixes to "two standard fixes" instead of B's broader "Typical fixes" list with more branches.
verdict.fabrication: none; both make standard React/Next.js claims and neither invents facts beyond the question.
verdict.actionability: B; the mounted-flag snippet and "next/dynamic" option make the fix easier to apply immediately.
